Introduction
    Kazuki Aikawa has worked as a university lecturer for a half year. He teaches the subject of ethology. He is fascinated by the mystery of living creatures and has a tendency to focus only on that. He is not good at following rules...

Also known as: 僕らは奇跡でできている
